name: Criteo
description: Criteo Marketing Solutions API 2024-10 — manage advertisers, campaigns, ad sets, audiences, and pull retargeting + commerce-media performance reports. OAuth2 client_credentials grant (no user interaction).

credential_fields.name: token
credential_fields.label: access_token
credential_fields.description: Bearer token from POST /oauth2/token (grant_type=client_credentials). Lifetime 15 minutes.

credential_fields.name: client_id
credential_fields.label: Client ID
credential_fields.description: Criteo API client ID — from Developer Portal > API Apps

tools.name: list_advertisers
tools.description: List advertisers the API client has access to.

tools.name: list_campaigns
tools.description: List campaigns. Filter by advertiser-ids or campaign-ids; paginate with limit/offset.

tools.name: create_campaign
tools.description: Create a campaign. Body data wraps {type: 'Campaign', attributes: {advertiserId, name, spendLimit, objective (Acquisition|Retention|ConsiderationVideo|...), goal, ...}}.

tools.name: update_campaign
tools.description: PATCH a campaign by id. Body wraps {data: {type: 'Campaign', id, attributes: {fields to update}}}.

tools.name: list_ad_sets
tools.description: List ad sets. Filter by advertiser-ids, campaign-ids, ad-set-ids.

tools.name: create_ad_set
tools.description: Create one or more ad sets. data is an array of resource objects: each {type: 'AdSet', attributes: {campaignId, name, destinationEnvironment (Web|App|Undefined), schedule {startDate, endDate?, deliveryType (Standard|Accelerated)}, bidding {biddingStrategy, costController, bidAmount?}, targeting, mediaType}}.

tools.name: patch_ad_sets
tools.description: Bulk-update ad sets. data: array of {type:'AdSet', id, attributes:{...}}.

tools.name: list_audiences
tools.description: List audiences for an advertiser. Filter by advertiser-id.

tools.name: create_audience
tools.description: Create an audience (segmentation). Common types via subResource: ContactList (CRM upload), Behavioral (in-product behavior), Lookalike, Targeting. Body: {data: {type: 'Audience', attributes: {advertiserId, name, description, subResource, ...}}}.

tools.name: statistics_report
tools.description: Pull statistics. body: {dimensions (e.g. ['CampaignId','AdSetId','Day']), metrics (Clicks,Displays,SalesPc,SalesPv,SalesAllPostView,RevenuePc,Spend,...), startDate, endDate, format (Json|Csv|Xml|Excel), currency, advertiserIds, timezone}.

tools.name: transactions_report
tools.description: Pull transactional report (per-conversion granularity). Same body shape as statistics_report but with eventType and orderId-level breakdowns.
